title: CMS Measure Detail
description: This page shows a single CMS eCQM and all of its linked VSAC value sets. Each value set represents a population criterion — initial patient population, denominator, numerator, exclusions — and maps to OMOP standard concepts for execution against CDM data.
tips: The CBE number and expansion version identify the exact specification version of this measure.
Click any value set name to view its codes, OMOP mappings, and clinical purpose.
The OMOP concepts column shows how many codes have been translated to OMOP standard concepts. Low coverage may cause under-counting.
Value sets with zero OMOP concepts need manual mapping review before this measure can be executed accurately.
This measure's criteria are implemented as FHIR Measure logic — download the FHIR Measure from the bundle detail page to inspect the full CQL.
